noCustomers: No B2B customers yet. Create one to get started.
createB2BCustomerSubtitle: Add a new business customer with company details and credit terms
createContractDescription: Choose a B2B customer and optional dates. The contract number is generated if you leave it blank.
contractsListEmptyHintPending: No contracts yet. Use Create contract when you are ready.
contractsListEmptyHintNoCustomers: No B2B customers yet. Add one under B2B Customers, then create a contract here with Create contract or from that customer’s page.
contractsListEmptyHintHasCustomers: No contracts yet. You already have B2B customers — use Create contract if it appears above, or go to B2B Customers, open a customer, and use the Contracts tab.
noContactsYet: No contacts yet for this customer.
contactsEmptySubtext: Add contacts using B2B contacts management or the API when it is available.
customerContractsEmptyTitle: No contracts linked to this customer yet.
customerContractsEmptyHint: Use the B2B Contracts page to create a contract and select this customer.
customerStatementsEmptyTitle: No statements for this customer yet.
customerStatementsEmptyHint: Use the B2B Statements page to generate statements for this customer.
